workflows.description: Video-equivalent single-garment pass. Uses Flux Fill, Redux garment reference, CatVTON LoRA, mask inpaint, and IC-LoRA image packing.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Same try-on graph, but named for the production mask pipeline. It expects a processed mask generated by SCHP/SAM/manual tools.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Pass 1 of sample 015 multi-item outfit: dress only.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Pass 2 of sample 015 multi-item outfit: shoes only, using pass 1 output as person input.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Pass 3 of sample 015 multi-item outfit: hat only, using pass 2 output as person input.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Optional refine pass for seam/artifact masks only. Do not mask the whole outfit here.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Fallback API graph from the production runner. It uses Redux + LoRA but does not pack garment/person with AddMaskForICLora.

input_contract.person_image: single person/current pass image in ComfyUI input
input_contract.mask_image: target-region mask image, white means editable

workflows.description: Visual node graph for consuming SCHP/SAM/manual processed masks in a single-garment Flux Fill + Redux + CatVTON LoRA pass.
Runs the ATR/SCHP-style human parser and optional SAM boundary refinement inside ComfyUI, then feeds the processed mask into the single-garment Flux Fill + Redux + CatVTON LoRA graph.

input_contract.target_region: upper, lower, dress, shoes, hat, or accessory

workflows.description: Same SCHP/SAM-inside-ComfyUI graph as file 14, arranged left-to-right for easier inspection and demos.

input_contract.target_region: upper, lower, dress, shoes, hat, or accessory

notes: API workflows can be queued through ComfyUI /prompt.
UI workflows are meant to be loaded in the ComfyUI editor.
All Flux Redux + CatVTON passes are single-garment contracts.
Multi-item outfits must be run sequentially, with each output becoming the next pass person image.
